{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sugata Shrine'''|菅田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].
